title: Fresh Fast Australian Macaroni Pasta
description: A quick and easy Australian dish featuring macaroni, tempering chocolate, and keto-friendly ingredients, perfect for a fast weeknight dinner
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the macaroni according to package instructions
In a separate pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat and add the chopped parsley
Add the grated parmesan cheese to the pan and stir until melted and well combined
Melt the tempering chocolate in a double boiler or in the microwave in 30-second increments, stirring between each interval
Drain the cooked macaroni and add it to the pan with the parmesan cheese mixture
Stir in the melted tempering chocolate and season with salt, black pepper, and garlic powder
Garnish with additional chopped parsley if desired
